error.signature: InvalidRequestError: This model maximum context length is N tokens

verdict.summary: Total tokens (prompt + completion) exceed model context window.

dead_ends.action: Set max_tokens to a very large number
dead_ends.why_fails: max_tokens + prompt_tokens must fit in context window.

dead_ends.action: Remove system prompt to save tokens
dead_ends.why_fails: System prompt is often critical for correct behavior.

workarounds.action: Implement sliding window or summarization for conversation history
workarounds.how: Keep last N messages; summarize older context

workarounds.action: Count tokens before sending and trim if needed
workarounds.how: Use tiktoken to count; truncate oldest messages first
